state.coderResponse:
The implementation is complete. Here's a summary of what was delivered against the PRP.

## Result

```json
{
   "result": "success",
   "message": "P1.M7.T2.S1 fully implemented â€” the stagehand default-action main surface. All 4 validation gates pass (build, vet, go test ./cmd/stagehand/ -v with 33 PASS, go test ./... with 8 packages ok); gofmt clean. providers.go and config.go UNCHANGED.\n\nDELIVERABLES:\n1. cmd/stagehand/run.go (NEW): pure, os.Exit-free helpers â€” buildFlags (env via os.LookupEnv, flag via cmd.Flags().Changed, honors present-but-zero; parses STAGEHAND_TIMEOUT, surfaces parse errors), resolveAndCheckProvider (cfg.Providerâ†’first-detected + friendly 'Provider X: command Y not found. Is the agent installed?'), maybeAutoStagePolicy (FR16â€“FR20 via a minimal `stager` interface so *git.Git + test stubs both satisfy it), buildOptions, mapErrorToExitCode (nilâ†’0, ErrNothingToCommitâ†’2, ErrRescueâ†’3, otherâ†’1 via ui.Exit* constants), and runDefault (Loadâ†’trust noticeâ†’provider checkâ†’maybeAutoStageâ†’GenerateCommitâ†’map). Staging POLICY lives ONLY here (v2 seam preserved).\n2. cmd/stagehand/main.go (EDIT): init()+registerPersistentFlags registers the 9 persistent flags with exact names + -a/-v shorthands (--version handled by cobra Version field, --help built-in); rootCmd.Run = os.Exit(runDefault(cmd)); rootCmd.Long = PRD Â§15.1 synopsis; main() exits ui.ExitError on Execute failure. Preserves var version, Version field, siblings' init() registrations.\n3. cmd/stagehand/run_test.go (NEW): white-box package main, stdlib+cobra+internal+pkg/stagehand, NO testify â€” covers buildFlags precedence/present-but-zero/env-absent/timeout-parse, resolveAndCheckProvider friendly-msg+first-detected+none-detected, mapErrorToExitCode table (incl. wrapped sentinel), maybeAutoStage FR16/17/18/19/20, buildOptions dry-run wiring, --version short-circuit, persistent-flag registration, rootCmd.Long.\n4. docs/CONFIGURATION.md (EDIT): added Â§8 CLI flags (PRD Â§15.2 table with the verbose v1 gap + stdout-clean notes) and Â§9 Exit codes (PRD Â§15.4 table documenting the timeoutâ†’rescueâ†’3 collapse and 124 reserved); replaced the P1.M7.T2.S1 placeholder with live Â§8/Â§9 cross-links.\n\nSmoke-tested the binary: --versionâ†’0, empty-repo auto-stageâ†’2 (FR16/17/18), --no-auto-stageâ†’2 (FR19), unknown providerâ†’1 with friendly msg, stdout stays byte-clean (FR51). CLI does NOT re-print the FR42 block or DryRun message (CommitStaged owns stdout); all CLI notices go to stderr via out.Progressf."
}
```

### Key design decisions honored
- **Run + os.Exit** (not RunE) â€” cobra's RunE can't carry exit codes 2/3; mirrors `generate.handleSignal(...) int` return-code seam.
- **`stager` interface** â€” keeps FR16â€“FR20 staging logic hermetic and testable without a real git binary, while `*git.Git` satisfies it in production.
- **Timeoutâ†’rescueâ†’3 documented** (not silently special-cased to 124) per research Â§2 and the snapshot-rescue contract.
- **Verbose v1 gap documented** â€” `GenerateCommit` hardcodes `verbose=false`, so full FR50 agent-trace is a follow-up; the flag is still wired into cfg + the CLI's own output.
- **No `SilenceErrors`/`SilenceUsage`** â€” removed because the default action's `Run`+`os.Exit` bypasses cobra's error handling; setting them globally would have wrongly suppressed `providers`/`config` subcommand error printing.

coderResult.message:
P1.M7.T2.S1 fully implemented â€” the stagehand default-action main surface. All 4 validation gates pass (build, vet, go test ./cmd/stagehand/ -v with 33 PASS, go test ./... with 8 packages ok); gofmt clean. providers.go and config.go UNCHANGED.

DELIVERABLES:
1. cmd/stagehand/run.go (NEW): pure, os.Exit-free helpers â€” buildFlags (env via os.LookupEnv, flag via cmd.Flags().Changed, honors present-but-zero; parses STAGEHAND_TIMEOUT, surfaces parse errors), resolveAndCheckProvider (cfg.Providerâ†’first-detected + friendly 'Provider X: command Y not found. Is the agent installed?'), maybeAutoStagePolicy (FR16â€“FR20 via a minimal `stager` interface so *git.Git + test stubs both satisfy it), buildOptions, mapErrorToExitCode (nilâ†’0, ErrNothingToCommitâ†’2, ErrRescueâ†’3, otherâ†’1 via ui.Exit* constants), and runDefault (Loadâ†’trust noticeâ†’provider checkâ†’maybeAutoStageâ†’GenerateCommitâ†’map). Staging POLICY lives ONLY here (v2 seam preserved).
2. cmd/stagehand/main.go (EDIT): init()+registerPersistentFlags registers the 9 persistent flags with exact names + -a/-v shorthands (--version handled by cobra Version field, --help built-in); rootCmd.Run = os.Exit(runDefault(cmd)); rootCmd.Long = PRD Â§15.1 synopsis; main() exits ui.ExitError on Execute failure. Preserves var version, Version field, siblings' init() registrations.
3. cmd/stagehand/run_test.go (NEW): white-box package main, stdlib+cobra+internal+pkg/stagehand, NO testify â€” covers buildFlags precedence/present-but-zero/env-absent/timeout-parse, resolveAndCheckProvider friendly-msg+first-detected+none-detected, mapErrorToExitCode table (incl. wrapped sentinel), maybeAutoStage FR16/17/18/19/20, buildOptions dry-run wiring, --version short-circuit, persistent-flag registration, rootCmd.Long.
4. docs/CONFIGURATION.md (EDIT): added Â§8 CLI flags (PRD Â§15.2 table with the verbose v1 gap + stdout-clean notes) and Â§9 Exit codes (PRD Â§15.4 table documenting the timeoutâ†’rescueâ†’3 collapse and 124 reserved); replaced the P1.M7.T2.S1 placeholder with live Â§8/Â§9 cross-links.

Smoke-tested the binary: --versionâ†’0, empty-repo auto-stageâ†’2 (FR16/17/18), --no-auto-stageâ†’2 (FR19), unknown providerâ†’1 with friendly msg, stdout stays byte-clean (FR51). CLI does NOT re-print the FR42 block or DryRun message (CommitStaged owns stdout); all CLI notices go to stderr via out.Progressf.
